title: Today
tagline: The private iPhone companion I use for weight, workouts, and the day's plan
summary: Today is the iPhone app I use for quick morning weight, gym logging, and the day's coach plan. It stays useful offline, remembers my last sets, and feeds the right level of detail into the rest of my fitness system.
outcome: A signed iPhone app now links HealthKit, WorkoutKit, encrypted coach sync, and the live fitness dashboard without creating a second workout record.
role: Designed and built the native app, encrypted sync, and public/private data contract
proofPoints: 700+ exercise catalog, prior-set defaults, flexible splits, and detailed muscle mapping
AES-256-GCM coach sync, Keychain credentials, protected recovery, and consent-scoped public stats
HealthKit, WorkoutKit, App Intents, and 52 tests across persistence, security, plans, mobility, and UI
